response.justification: Bogdan has strong experience in software development, distributed systems, and leadership, but lacks direct experience with C++ (only brief mention in early career) and cloud compute platform architecture. His expertise leans toward web/mobile development and distributed systems using Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang, which partially aligns with the role but misses key technical depth in C++ and cloud infrastructure. His leadership and mentorship experience is notable but not in a cloud/DevOps context.
strengths: Extensive distributed systems experience (micro-services, high-throughput systems)
Strong leadership and mentorship background (training, workshops, team guidance)
Proven ability to deliver large-scale projects and optimize systems
concerns: Limited direct C++ experience (only early career and thesis involvement)
No explicit cloud architecture or compute platform experience
Lack of production-level cloud DevOps/engineering mentorship
